title: [suggestion]allow the mix of ANSI and Non-ANSI module declaration

features.name: port redeclaration after ANSI header
features.description: Code should include a module with ANSI-style port declarations followed by a reg/wire redeclaration of the same port name inside the module body
features.snippet:
module top(input clk, output [31:0] cnt);
reg [31:0] cnt;
